item.title: AbbVie Manufacturing Investment
item.description:
• Summary: AbbVie is investing $1.4 billion to establish a new manufacturing site in North Carolina, expected to be completed during the Trump administration. This investment will create over 730 jobs and enhance AbbVie's production capacity for its pharmaceutical portfolio, supporting long-term supply chain resilience.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, Fierce Pharma

item.title: Lilly Exits Rigel RIPK1 Alliance
item.description:
• Summary: Eli Lilly has terminated its alliance with Rigel Pharmaceuticals on RIPK1 inhibitors, reflecting the pharmaceutical industry's waning interest in this target due to clinical challenges and competitive pressures. This exit adds to the setbacks for RIPK1-focused drug development.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News, BioSpace

item.title: Corporate Deals & Strategy
item.description:
• Summary: Amneal acquired Kashiv Biosciences for $1.1 billion to expand in biosimilars, BridgeBio's oncology spinoff changed CEOs to accelerate KRAS work, and Nektar raised $325 million amid Merck deal rumors. Sanofi's new CEO is reevaluating R&D strategy, with broader moves including Lilly's CAR-T deal and Denali's win shaping industry landscape.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma, Endpoints News, Endpoints News, Endpoints News, BioSpace

item.title: Samsung Biologics Labor Dispute
item.description:
• Summary: Samsung Biologics continues to report growth but is embroiled in a labor dispute as unions rally and move towards a strike, highlighting operational challenges for the contract development and manufacturing organization.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
